lyrics: Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Down to my last breath, my last time, my last mission, oh My last breath, my last time Down to my last breath Oh, I'm down on my luck at last I'm down to let you one last breath Hate me now, yeah, hate me for the rest of your disaster of a life Hate me for the things that I did to you If it makes it easier to see me fall Never would've treated you the way you made me out Yeah, I'm down, down, down to one last breath I'm down, down, down to one last breath One last thought, one last life, one last moment to tell you I'll never ever be near again I'm down to this last thought of you and all I'll ever be Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Is it gonna get worse when you try to ignore the things that got us here in the first place And you look at me like a waste of space I'm just wasting your space and time All the packages and all the lies and everything I read to you to make you think you wanted me as yours Well, guess what, I'm down, down, down, down to one last breath, one last breath Yeah, I'm just down, down, down, down to one last breath of you One last thought, I'm down, down, down, down to one Once again, I know I'm forever as I am I'll see you again, y'all Different perspective of life and death, reincarnation, why you fight me now? I'm down to one last breath I'm down to one last hell One last breath of me in my mental jail, yeah I'm down, down, down to one last breath for me Yeah, I'm down, down to one last breath Oh, baby, yeah, there's no way you can fix us here We're broken and gone and doomed, and gone and doomed, yeah There's no way you can fix us, baby, we're just gone and doomed Our life has become a toxic non-healing mess of fabrication of lies, lies, lies As you go give up somewhere else and I cry and die Cause I'm down, down, down, down to my last breath for you

lyricsSegments.text: Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Down to my last breath, my last time, my last mission, oh
My last breath, my last time
Down to my last breath
Oh, I'm down on my luck at last
I'm down to let you one last breath
Hate me now, yeah, hate me for the rest of your disaster of a life
Hate me for the things that I did to you
If it makes it easier to see me fall
Never would've treated you the way you made me out
Yeah, I'm down, down, down to one last breath
I'm down, down, down to one last breath
One last thought, one last life, one last moment to tell you I'll never ever be near again
I'm down to this last thought of you and all I'll ever be
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Is it gonna get worse when you try to ignore the things that got us here in the first place
And you look at me like a waste of space
I'm just wasting your space and time
All the packages and all the lies and everything I read to you to make you think you wanted me as yours
Well, guess what, I'm down, down, down, down to one last breath, one last breath
Yeah, I'm just down, down, down, down to one last breath of you
One last thought, I'm down, down, down, down to one
Once again, I know I'm forever as I am
I'll see you again, y'all
Different perspective of life and death, reincarnation, why you fight me now?
I'm down to one last breath
I'm down to one last hell
One last breath of me in my mental jail, yeah
I'm down, down, down to one last breath for me
Yeah, I'm down, down to one last breath
Oh, baby, yeah, there's no way you can fix us here
We're broken and gone and doomed, and gone and doomed, yeah
There's no way you can fix us, baby, we're just gone and doomed
Our life has become a toxic non-healing mess of fabrication of lies, lies, lies
As you go give up somewhere else and I cry and die
Cause I'm down, down, down, down to my last breath for you
